name: Led Zeppelin
bio: Led Zeppelin has a durable catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: Led Zeppelin remains closely associated with Stairway to Heaven and Whole Lotta Love, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like Stairway to Heaven and Whole Lotta Love still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings even after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and listener rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand help extend catalog value over time.
